blackjack_slm_policy.name: blackjack_slm_policy
blackjack_slm_policy.value: For Blackjack-v0: Stand on 17 or higher; hit below 17 unless bust risk is obvious.

frozenlake_slm_policy.name: frozenlake_slm_policy
frozenlake_slm_policy.value: For FrozenLake-v0: Plan a safe path to G while avoiding H; output one bracketed direction.

general_textarena_slm_policy.name: general_textarena_slm_policy
general_textarena_slm_policy.value:
Follow the visible TextArena rules. Track state across observations, avoid repeating invalid actions, and output only one legal action.

Learned rules:
- Before answering, copy the exact action format from the current game instructions; if a previous action failed or made no progress, choose a different legal action.

guessthenumber_slm_policy.name: guessthenumber_slm_policy
guessthenumber_slm_policy.value: For GuessTheNumber-v0: Maintain lower and upper bounds from higher/lower hints and guess the midpoint.

mastermind_slm_policy.name: mastermind_slm_policy
mastermind_slm_policy.value: For Mastermind-v0: Maintain candidate codes and eliminate guesses inconsistent with black/white feedback.

nim_slm_policy.name: nim_slm_policy
nim_slm_policy.value: For Nim-v0: Use the xor strategy: move to a zero nim-sum when possible.
